calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-01-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: S. Vantree, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288
Petitioners CHI MAN LEE and TUNG YING LI were present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minors: MAN HO LEE and PUI YU LEE

Cantonese Interpreter: JIEYING MING. Petitioners and Interpreter was placed under oath and examined.

Proof of Publication is in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors to MAN HO LEE to VINCENT MANHO LEE and PUI YU LEE to RACHEL PUIYU LEE.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
